rulings.Case Title: MARION KOSICH et al VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Consolidate Successor In Interest Action (Cgc-06-458226) With Wrongful Death And Successor In Interest Action (Cgc-10-275663); And Motion To Vacate Or Continue Trial Date Of Case No. Cgc-06-458226
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 23, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Pneumo Abex LLC¿s motion to consolidate cases and to vacate the trial date in case no. 458226 is granted per plaintiffs¿ conditional non-opposition. Cases numbered 458226 and 275663 are consolidated. Henceforth, all papers shall be filed and served under case number 458226. The trial date for case no. 458226 is vacated. The consolidated actions will keep the August 18, 2011 status and setting conference date. The hearing on this motion will be held on Tuesday March 1, 2011 at 9:30am. Anyone wishing to contest the tentative ruling must advise the court by emailing contestasbestostr@sftc.org, and must advise all parties, by 4:00 pm on February 22. = (220/HEK)
